messages.INVALID_API_KEY: Invalid or missing API key. Please check your OpenRouter API key.
messages.RATE_LIMITED: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait before making more requests.
messages.MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Model not found. The model may have been removed or renamed.
messages.MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: Model is currently unavailable. This is common with free models. Try a different model.
messages.INVALID_PARAMETERS: Invalid parameters provided. Please check your request parameters.
messages.INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS: Insufficient credits. Please add more credits to your OpenRouter account.
messages.PROVIDER_ERROR: The model provider encountered an error. Please try again or use a different model.
messages.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
messages.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. The model may be experiencing high load.
messages.UNKNOWN: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

tips.RATE_LIMITED: Wait a few seconds before retrying.
tips.INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS: Visit https://openrouter.ai/credits to add more credits.
tips.MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Try refreshing the model list to get the latest models.
tips.MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: Free models are often intermittently unavailable. Use getBestFreeModel() to find a working one, or skip the test when adding.
tips.PROVIDER_ERROR: This model may be temporarily unavailable. Try another model.
tips.INVALID_PARAMETERS: Check that your parameters are within the model's supported range.
